description: Agent-experience ground-truth battery: questions a working agent would ask its memory, with expected-answer tokens. Scored by containment in top-3 recall text. Seeded 2026-07-22 from a session where the grader held full ground truth.
scoring: hit = any expected_tokens group fully present in top-3 surfaced text; wrong_hit = high-score result unrelated to question; miss = no group present

questions.q: what is the flip condition for usage ranking
what broke deep recall on the dogfood brain
what is the product north star metric
what does the durable result boost do in ranking
what was the FastEmbed outage root cause
how are episode vectors written now capture or projection
what does the BM25 circuit breaker do
who is the founder of Engram and what are his goals

found_defects_2026_07_22: bootstrap 500 on every session start: create_entity -> native 'BM25 document <id> already exists' (stale BM25 doc for re-created entity; write-path upsert/delete inconsistency)
squatter entities: milestone observations extracted into sentence-long entity names scoring 0.99 on unrelated ranking queries
hook-noise episodes retrievable: task-notification/command-output auto-observes now vector-indexed by the backfill and ranking top-3 on technical queries
answer locality: long multi-fact observations don't surface for their natural single-fact questions (chunking/cue gap)
identity_core content never surfaced for an identity question
